steps.title: Compare displayed services
steps.content: The graph shows project leaders' ratings for the services in the answer choices. Medicinal plants is rated lower than improving the local microclimate, so the sentence should compare those two services in that direction.

steps.title: Reject unsupported or reversed data
steps.content: B includes offering educational opportunities, which is not one of the displayed services. C reverses the relationship by saying local microclimate was rated lower than medicinal plants. D includes tourist attractions, which is not shown. The answer is A.
